name: Rimrock
description_short: Rimrock Credit Union is a member-owned financial institution offering checking, savings, loans, and credit cards with 24/7 online banking access.
description_long:
Rimrock Credit Union operates as a member-owned financial cooperative providing comprehensive banking services to consumers in Montana and surrounding areas. The organization is headquartered in the Rimrock region and serves its membership through both physical locations and digital channels, emphasizing accessibility and member benefits.

The credit union offers a full suite of deposit products including Kasasa-branded checking and savings accounts, share certificates (CDs), and retirement accounts (Traditional and Roth IRAs). On the lending side, they provide auto loans, personal loans, home loans, and credit cards. Members also have access to online and mobile banking platforms, bill pay services, wire transfers, and ATM/debit card products. The institution promotes competitive rates on savings and CD products and offers Kasasa rewards programs tied to checking account activity.

Rimrock distinguishes itself through member-centric services including free notary services for members, payroll deduction options, and educational resources like financial calculators. They actively engage their community through scholarship programs (advertising a $5,000 scholarship) and maintain multiple contact channels via phone, email, and social media. The credit union model itself—where members are owners rather than customers of a for-profit entity—represents a structural advantage for rate competitiveness and service philosophy.

Rimrock is a solid regional credit union for consumers seeking relationship banking with competitive rates and member benefits. However, as a credit union, membership eligibility may be restricted based on geographic location or employment affiliation. The website provides limited transparency on specific APRs, fees, or membership requirements, requiring prospective members to contact the institution directly for detailed terms.
services: Checking accounts with Kasasa Cash Back and Kasasa Cash rewards options
Savings accounts and Share Certificates (CDs) with competitive rates
Traditional and Roth IRA retirement accounts
Online and mobile banking with bill pay
pros: Free notary services available for all members with proper photo ID
24/7 online and mobile banking access with e-statements and bill pay
Kasasa rewards programs tied to checking accounts (cash back, savings bonuses, fee waivers)
Competitive savings and CD rates with educational tools to compare returns
Member-focused benefits including payroll deduction and travel card services
Community engagement through scholarship programs and financial education
Multiple contact methods: phone (406-248-3685 or 888-578-8380), email, and social media
cons: Membership eligibility likely restricted by location or employment—not open to all consumers
Website provides no specific APRs, fees, or minimum balance requirements for any products
Limited information about loan approval criteria, terms, or processing timelines
No transparent comparison of rates against national or regional competitors
Notary services require appointment scheduling and in-person presence of all signers
best_for: Montana residents seeking member-owned banking with relationship-focused service
Consumers eligible for credit union membership through employment or geographic affiliation
Savers interested in competitive CD rates and Kasasa rewards-checking products
Borrowers seeking auto loans, personal loans, or mortgages from a community-based lender
diagnosis: Rimrock Credit Union is best for residents in its service area who qualify for membership and seek full-service banking with member ownership benefits and competitive rates. The main caveat is that membership eligibility is likely restricted, and the website lacks transparent pricing details—interested consumers must contact the institution directly to understand specific rates, fees, and membership requirements.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: Rimrock — Credit Union in BILLINGS, MT | CreditDoc
meta_description: Rimrock — NCUA-insured credit union in BILLINGS, MT. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
